# Carbon Baseline & Supplier Engagement

This engagement delivers Acme Corp's first independently verified GHG inventory, covering Scope 1 (direct combustion and process emissions) and Scope 2 (purchased electricity) to satisfy the board's June reporting milestone. Parallel supplier outreach is mapping Scope 3 Category 1 spend to inform whether a full Scope 3 phase-two engagement is warranted. Weekly check-ins with Jane and Dani maintain momentum on data collection and keep procurement aligned on the supplier survey timeline.
